subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1912-04-22 in Washington
subcodes.first_line: In the world of existence there are three stages, the mineral, the vegetable, and the animal.
subcodes.subjects: @proofs for the existence; immortality of the soul, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @existence; immortality of the human soul, @the lower is unable to comprehend the higher, @limits of the intellect
